packages.title: Southeast Asia Explorer
packages.overview: Embark on an incredible 13-day journey through three of Southeast Asia's most vibrant destinations. From Bangkok's glittering temples and Chiang Mai's elephant sanctuaries to Hanoi's charming Old Quarter, Halong Bay's emerald waters, and Singapore's futuristic skyline — this trip is the perfect blend of culture, adventure, and luxury.
highlights: Private boat cruise through the UNESCO-listed Halong Bay
Hands-on Thai cooking class in Chiang Mai
Visit Bangkok's Grand Palace and Wat Pho
Explore Singapore's Gardens by the Bay
Ethical elephant sanctuary experience

itinerary.title: Arrive Bangkok
activities: Evening stroll along Khao San Road

itinerary.title: Bangkok Temples & Culture
activities: Grand Palace & Wat Phra Kaew (Emerald Buddha)

itinerary.title: Chiang Mai Experiences
activities: Thai cooking class with local chef

itinerary.title: Fly to Hanoi
activities: Hoan Kiem Lake & Ngoc Son Temple
Old Quarter walking tour & street food

itinerary.title: Halong Bay Cruise
activities: Drive to Halong Bay, board overnight cruise
Cave exploration at Sung Sot Caves

itinerary.title: Halong Bay & Return
activities: Swimming & beach time at secluded cove

itinerary.title: Hanoi to Ho Chi Minh City
activities: Morning flight to Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Mekong Delta
activities: Boat ride through canals & floating markets

itinerary.title: Fly to Singapore
activities: Gardens by the Bay & Cloud Forest

packages.title: European Dream Tour
packages.overview: Experience the crown jewels of Europe on this 15-day premium tour. Wander the romantic streets of Paris, stand in awe before the Colosseum in Rome, and soak up the vibrant culture of Barcelona. With 5-star accommodations, gourmet meals, and a Eurail pass, this tour delivers the very best of Europe in style.
highlights: Skip-the-line access to the Eiffel Tower and Louvre Museum
Private Vatican Museums and Sistine Chapel tour
Sagrada Familia and Park Güell in Barcelona
Seine River dinner cruise in Paris
Tuscany day trip with wine tasting

itinerary.title: Versailles Day Trip
activities: Palace of Versailles & Hall of Mirrors

itinerary.title: Vatican & Gelato
activities: Gelato tour in the old city

itinerary.title: Tuscany Day Trip
activities: Siena old town & Piazza del Campo
Chianti wine tasting at a vineyard

itinerary.title: Barcelona – Costa Brava
activities: Day trip to Costa Brava coastline

packages.title: Golden Triangle India
packages.overview: India's legendary Golden Triangle connects three of the country's most iconic cities — Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur. This 7-day heritage tour takes you through Mughal grandeur, royal Rajput palaces, and vibrant bazaars, offering an unforgettable introduction to India's rich history and culture.
highlights: Sunrise visit to the magnificent Taj Mahal
Explore Old Delhi's spice market and Red Fort
Amber Fort with optional elephant ride
City Palace and Hawa Mahal in Jaipur
Traditional Rajasthani folk dinner

itinerary.title: Old & New Delhi
activities: Red Fort & Chandni Chowk spice market

itinerary.title: Delhi to Agra
activities: Mehtab Bagh sunset view of Taj Mahal

itinerary.title: Jaipur – Markets & Culture
activities: Rajasthani folk dinner at cultural show

packages.title: Budget Wanderer
packages.overview: The ultimate budget adventure across three incredible Himalayan nations. Experience Kathmandu's sacred temples, Bhutan's spiritual Tiger's Nest monastery, and return through India's hill towns. A life-changing journey that proves extraordinary travel doesn't have to break the bank.
highlights: Hike to Bhutan's iconic Tiger's Nest Monastery
Sunrise view of the Himalayas from Nagarkot
Pashupatinath Temple and Boudhanath Stupa in Kathmandu
Traditional Bhutanese hot stone bath
Darjeeling tea estate visit

itinerary.title: Tiger's Nest Hike
activities: Full-day hike to Paro Taktsang (Tiger's Nest)
Prayer flag valleys and cliff views

itinerary.title: Thimphu – Bhutan Capital
activities: Thimphu city tour & Buddha Dordenma statue

itinerary.title: Fly to Bagdogra, Darjeeling
activities: Flight to Bagdogra, jeep to Darjeeling

itinerary.title: Darjeeling Tiger Hill
activities: Tiger Hill sunrise view of Kanchenjunga

packages.title: Group Adventure Tour
packages.overview: The perfect group getaway combining the rich culture of Sri Lanka with the paradise beaches of the Maldives. Visit ancient temples, go whale watching, and then relax in overwater villas with crystal-clear lagoons. Designed for groups who want to bond over unforgettable shared experiences.
highlights: Climb the ancient Sigiriya Rock Fortress
Blue whale watching off Mirissa coast
Snorkeling in Maldivian coral reefs
Cultural show at Kandy's Temple of the Tooth
Group sunset BBQ on a Maldives sandbank

itinerary.title: Kandy – Hill Country
activities: Kandy train journey through tea country

packages.title: Weekend Gateway Bliss
packages.overview: A perfect 3-day escape for those who crave a quick recharge. Choose between Goa's golden beaches and vibrant nightlife or Himachal's misty mountains and apple orchards. Both options offer curated experiences that pack maximum joy into a short weekend getaway.
highlights: Private beach access at North Goa resort
Watersports: parasailing, jet-ski, banana boat
Himachal mountain drive to Solang Valley
Sunrise yoga with Himalayan backdrop
Local cuisine tasting experience

itinerary.title: Arrive & Check-In
activities: Afternoon leisure at beach or hill viewpoint

packages.title: Family Fun Holidays
packages.overview: A family adventure designed around creating memories that children and parents will cherish forever. Start with Kerala's backwater houseboats, spice gardens, and elephant interactions, then head to Andaman for clear-water beaches, glass-bottom boat rides, and snorkeling in one of India's most pristine marine ecosystems.
highlights: Overnight houseboat stay on Kerala backwaters
Elephant interaction at a responsible sanctuary
Glass-bottom boat ride in Andaman
Snorkeling at Elephant Beach, Havelock
Cellular Jail light & sound show

itinerary.title: Arrive Kochi, Kerala
activities: Kerala Folklore Museum visit (kids love it)
Fort Kochi sunset walk & seafood dinner

itinerary.title: Houseboat Backwaters
activities: Drive to Alleppey for houseboat boarding
Backwater cruise through paddy fields & villages
Overnight stay on houseboat with all meals

itinerary.title: Munnar Hills & Fly to Andaman
activities: Evening flight to Port Blair, Andaman
